memory.description: Persistent key-value memory for agent sessions

git.description: Optional git MCP (install may vary; use gh/git CLI if unavailable)

_notes.codebase-memory: Local indexes live in .codebase-memory/ (just memory). Not an npm MCP package.
_notes.sequential-thinking: Enable in host agent if available; not vendored here.
_notes.security: Do not commit real tokens. Map secrets via environment only.
